EnableCore.Name: Enable Lisa's Angry Initiative
EnableCore.Hint: Enable Lisa's Angry Initiative for active combats in this world.

AutoSizeInitDie.Name: Auto-Size Initiative Die
AutoSizeInitDie.Hint: Assign initiative dice from creature size: Tiny/Small d4, Medium d6, Large d8, Huge+ d10.

BlockReactionsWhileRecovering.Name: Block Reactions While Recovering
BlockReactionsWhileRecovering.Hint: Prevent recovering combatants from using reactions before their next phase arrives.

KnockbackThreshold.Name: Knockback Threshold
KnockbackThreshold.Hint: Reserved for heavier-hit knockback handling. Leave at 0 to use the default phase shift rule.

ShowPhaseVisuals.Name: Show Phase Visuals
ShowPhaseVisuals.Hint: Show current phase and next phase details in the combat tracker and attack chat cards.

Dialogs.CleanupPrompt: Would you like to remove Lisa's Angry Initiative combat flags from the active encounter?

Notifications.ReactionBlocked: You are recovering until Phase {phase} and cannot use reactions.
Notifications.ModuleActive: {title} is active. Configure it from the world settings.
Notifications.SettingsReset: {title} settings have been reset to their default values.

Chat.ReadiedAction: {name} readied an action and will act on Phase {phase}.
Chat.KnockbackApplied: Knockback! {name} was hit by {attackDie} against {initiativeDie} and shifts to Phase {phase}.
Chat.DelayedCombatant: Delayed! {name} was pushed out of the current round order and will re-enter on the next round.

Logs.PhaseApplied: Lisa's Angry Initiative | Applied Phase {phase} to {name} (Roll: {total}, Bonus: {bonus})
